channel.title: Webassembly on Example Academy
channel.description: Recent content in Webassembly on Example Academy

item.title: Processing Log Data with Fluent Bit and WebAssembly
item.description: This challenge examines using Fluent Bit and WASM to enrich log data based on pre-existing location data in the logs. The WASM plugin is just one of the options available for processing data with Fluent Bit.
